overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic video game showing a cowboy character walking through a rainy night in a historic city. The character navigates through enclosed courtyards, cobblestone streets, and narrow alleys illuminated by warm gas lamps, with heavy rain creating reflective wet surfaces throughout the Victorian-era urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed courtyard with balconies and archway passages

events.description: character moves from open courtyard into covered archway passage

agents.ego_description: walking through the enclosed courtyard, examining the surroundings and approaching the archway

entered.detail: multi-story brick building with wooden balconies and warm lantern light from windows
simple wooden bench against the courtyard wall
ornate wall-mounted gas lantern casting warm yellow light
stone archway leading to covered passage with wooden ceiling beams
stacked wooden barrels near the archway entrance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a rain-soaked enclosed courtyard surrounded by historic brick buildings with glowing balcony windows. The character walks on wet cobblestones past a wooden bench and wall lantern, moving toward and entering a covered stone archway passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: main commercial street with storefronts and street lamps

events.description: exits covered passage into open street with visible sky and rain
character turns left to follow the street direction

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet cobblestone street, passing by storefronts and street lamps

notable_agents.action: standing near building entrance, observing the street

entered.detail: row of historic commercial buildings with large windows and awnings
cast iron street lamp with warm glowing light reflecting on wet pavement
wooden construction barriers lining the edge of the street
horse-drawn carriage parked in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered passage onto a rain-slicked commercial street illuminated by gas street lamps. Walking past wooden barriers and storefronts, the scene opens up to show a horse carriage in the distance while an NPC stands near a building entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial district with illuminated restaurant signage

events.description: approaching the illuminated Jade Dragon Restaurant sign with red neon lighting

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the street toward the glowing restaurant sign

entered.detail: large illuminated red sign with 'JADE DRAGON RESTAURANT' text spanning the street
building facade decorated with hanging string lights and red lanterns
two-story building painted blue with white trim and balcony

segments.scene_description: Walking through the commercial district, the character approaches the prominent red neon sign of the Jade Dragon Restaurant. The street is lined with buildings featuring decorative string lights, and a couple stands conversing near a storefront as the character passes underneath the illuminated signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alleyway and side street with residential buildings

events.description: approaching a stationary horse carriage blocking part of the narrow street

agents.ego_description: navigating through darker narrow streets, approaching a carriage and passing a seated figure

notable_agents.action: person sitting on the ground leaning against building wall

entered.detail: covered horse-drawn carriage with large wheels parked in the street
narrow brick archway leading to a courtyard with warm light visible beyond
figure sitting on the ground near the building entrance

segments.scene_description: The character moves into darker, narrower streets away from the commercial district. Passing a person sitting against a building wall, the character approaches a horse carriage and a brick archway entrance that leads to a lit courtyard, with street lamps providing the only illumination in the rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: private courtyard with outdoor seating and potted plants

events.description: passing through brick archway into enclosed courtyard with tables and candles
slowing down and approaching the metal double doors at the courtyard end

agents.ego_description: entering the quiet courtyard and approaching the metal doors at the far end

entered.detail: wooden tables with lit candles arranged around a central tree
large potted tree in the center of the courtyard
pair of metal doors with wall lanterns on either side, serving as the destination
stacked wooden crates and storage boxes against the courtyard wall

segments.scene_description: Passing through the brick archway, the character enters a quiet enclosed courtyard sheltered from the rain. The space features candlelit wooden tables arranged around a central potted tree, with wooden crates stacked against the walls. The character slows down and approaches the metal double doors at the far end of the courtyard.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded, rain-soaked courtyard into the vibrant, illuminated commercial heart of a Victorian-era city. It begins within an enclosed brick courtyard, following the character across wet cobblestones and past glowing lanterns toward a covered stone archway. As the character emerges from the passage, the environment opens into a wider, rain-slicked street where gas lamps cast reflections on the ground and a horse carriage appears in the distance. The scene then shifts further into the commercial district, passing wooden barriers and conversing pedestrians as the lighting becomes more colorful. Finally, the camera follows the character as they move beneath the prominent red neon glow of the Jade Dragon Restaurant and its surrounding decorative string lights.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the rain-slicked darkness of narrow city streets into the sheltered warmth of a secluded courtyard. It begins as the character navigates away from the commercial district, passing a figure leaning against a wall and a horse carriage under the dim glow of street lamps. As the character approaches a brick archway, the camera follows them through the entrance, transitioning from the heavy downpour into a quiet, enclosed space. The scene then opens up to reveal candlelit wooden tables and stacked crates surrounding a central potted tree, where the lighting shifts from cold street lamps to a soft, flickering amber. Finally, the character slows their pace as the camera tracks them toward a set of metal double doors at the far end of the courtyard.
